billing.checkout.success.verifying.title: Verifying payment…
billing.checkout.success.verifying.descr: This usually takes a few seconds. Please keep this page open.
billing.checkout.success.ready.title: Payment confirmed
billing.checkout.success.ready.descripti: Your access is ready. Start learning!
billing.checkout.success.timeout.title: Still processing
billing.checkout.success.timeout.descrip: Your payment may still be processing. Check billing settings in a moment.
billing.checkout.cancel.title: Checkout cancelled
billing.checkout.cancel.description: No charge was made. You can return to the course catalog when you are ready.
